task_description: Phase 29: Quality Gates - 80% coverage + mutation + e2e + load + security. Create comprehensive quality infrastructure in packages/testing with coverage gate enforcement, Stryker mutation testing config, Playwright e2e framework with 30 journey definitions, k6 load test scripts, security scanning configs, and CI/CD workflows.

verification.summary: All 49 tests pass across 6 test files. New TypeScript files compile cleanly with strict mode (pre-existing errors in core/ modules unrelated to this work). All required files created: coverage-gate.ts, mutation-gate.ts, stryker.conf.mjs, playwright.config.ts, 30 e2e journeys, 3 k6 scripts, OWASP ZAP + Snyk configs, quality-gates.yml workflow.
